<svg viewBox="0 0 3486 1057" width="3486" height="1057" role="img" aria-labelledby="chart-title chart-desc">
<title id="chart-title">DASHSys end-to-end system dataflow flowchart</title>
<desc id="chart-desc">User Prompt Input | Runtime Config / Safety Preflight | Prompt Routing | Query Understanding | Context Selection | Planning | SQL Evidence Path | Adobe API Evidence Path | Live API / Dry-run Split | Mock Live API Readiness | EvidenceBus | Answer Slots | Answer Synthesis | Trajectory Logging | Evaluation | Final Submission / Reports | User Prompt | Config / env | Safety preflight | Tool contract execute_sql / call_api | Prompt Routing | Simple Prompt Gate | Use data pipeline? | Query Normalization | Query Token Extraction | Deterministic QueryRouter | Answer Intent | QueryAnalysis | Semantic router enabled? | SDK LLMClient | LLM Semantic Routing Helper | Hint validation | shadow / not promoted | SchemaIndex | EndpointCatalog | Relevance scoring | Context packing | SQL_FIRST_API_VERIFY packaged strategy | Evidence policy | Tool-call budget | Selected plan | SQL template / generic SQL | SQL validation passed? | SQLGlot AST validation | execute_sql DuckDB snapshot | SQL result | SQL evidence | API plan | Endpoint catalog validation | API validation passed? | Credential/header construction | call_api(method, url, params, headers) | Adobe credentials present? | Live API mode live readiness: warning | Dry-run fallback no credentials | API response parser | evidence_state live_success / live_empty api_error / malformed dry_run_unavailable | Parsed API evidence | Synthetic fixtures | Mock live parser success: 126 | Discovery-chain readiness chains: 5 | EvidenceBus forwarding | Answer slot verification | diagnostic only | EvidenceBus | ids / names / counts statuses / timestamps | SQL / live API / dry-run state | Answer Slots | COUNT / LIST STATUS / WHEN YES_NO | source tracking | Evidence-Aware Answer Synthesis | Evidence-aware templates | Claim Faithfulness Check | Answer-only rewrite trial keep_trial_only | not promoted | Final Answer | Trajectory Logging | metadata.json | filled_system_prompt.txt | trajectory.json | Strict Eval score: 0.6553 | Hidden-style Eval 48/48 | LLM baseline eval diagnostic only | check_submission_ready ready: True | final_submission packaging | source_code.zip | Workshop audit pass | Consolidated report index</desc>
<defs>
<filter id="soft-shadow" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="125%"><feDropShadow dx="0" dy="1.2" stdDeviation="1.4" flood-color="#0f172a" flood-opacity=".12"/></filter>
<marker id="arrow-packaged" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#14532d"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-final" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1d4ed8"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-muted" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#64748b"/></marker>
<marker id="arrow-trial" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse"><path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#a16207"/></marker>
</defs>
